justification: O(n) algorithm is present (two-Set approach). AC4 edge case (3+ occurrences returned once) is tested. AC3 has a runtime performance test (1M IDs < 100ms), which is good. However, the output is a plan summary describing what will be created, not the actual delivered implementation with confidence section, acceptance_criteria_coverage mapping, or notes explaining why O(n²) was rejected. Missing: confidence section noting AC3 requires runtime validation, explicit rejection rationale for O(n²), and structured acceptance_criteria_coverage output.
